title: 12 Living Room Essentials: Coastal Grandmother Style
excerpt: Coastal Grandmother is a living room aesthetic defined by natural materials and a relaxed, sun-faded palette: chalky whites, dusty navies, sage, and sea-glass blue-green. These 12 picks build the look.

body:
# 12 Living Room Essentials: Coastal Grandmother Style

Coastal Grandmother is a living room aesthetic defined by natural materials and a relaxed, sun-faded palette: chalky whites, dusty navies, sage, and sea-glass blue-green. Textures do the heavy lifting — slubby linen, woven seagrass, hand-thrown ceramics, reclaimed wood. Nothing is overly coordinated; everything feels calm and collected. Here are 12 pieces that build the look.

1. [MIULEE Royal Blue Striped Pillow Covers, 26x26, Pack of 2](https://www.amazon.com/MIULEE-Striped-Farmhouse-Decorative-Cushion/dp/B0CZL757BX) — These farmhouse-style cushion covers bring a classic coastal stripe in a deep navy blue. The 26×26 size is perfect for layering on a sofa or armchair.

2. [Crate & Barrel Brisbane White Ceramic Vase, 12"](https://www.crateandbarrel.com/brisbane-white-ceramic-vase-12/s416591) — A quietly sculptural piece in matte white ceramic. Fill it with dried pampas grass or eucalyptus for instant coastal-grandmother charm.

3. [Linfevisi Wooden Whale Tail Decor](https://www.amazon.com/Linfevisi-Tabletop-Nautical-Sculpture-Figurines/dp/B0C7G6DFZ8) — A small, handcrafted tabletop sculpture that nods to the sea without being kitschy. Works beautifully on a console table, bookshelf, or coffee table vignette.

4. [Pottery Barn Colossal Handknit Throw, Chambray](https://www.potterybarn.com/products/colossal-handknit-throw/) — Chunky, lofty, and inviting — this handknit throw in soft chambray blue is the kind of blanket that lives on the back of the sofa and gets used every day.

5. [Pottery Barn Malibu Rectangular Woven Nesting Tables](https://www.potterybarn.com/products/malibu-woven-nesting-tables/) — These rattan-style nesting tables are functional and beautiful. Tuck them beside a chair or use the set around the sofa for flexible surface space.

6. [Safavieh Natural Fiber NF108 Hand Woven Area Rug, Natural, 9×12](https://www.target.com/p/natural-fiber-nf108-hand-woven-area-rug-natural-9-x12-safavieh/-/A-88215413) — A foundational piece for the coastal look. The hand-woven natural fiber construction adds texture and warmth underfoot while staying neutral enough to anchor any palette.

7. [Berea Chair, Malcolm Stripe Mauve, Threshold (Target)](https://www.target.com/p/berea-chair-malcolm-stripe-mauve-threshold-8482/-/A-94743634) — An upholstered accent chair in a soft mauve stripe that reads as quietly coastal. Well-priced and well-proportioned for smaller living spaces.

8. [Mitzi Eleanor 1-Light Pendant, Aged Brass](https://mitzi.com/products/eleanor-pendant-h988701l-agb) — A refined pendant light with aged brass hardware that bridges coastal and vintage. Use it over a reading nook, dining area, or kitchen island adjacent to the living room.

9. [TOV Furniture Marza Natural Jute 2-Bulb Floor Lamp](https://tovfurniture.com/products/marza-natural-jute-2-bulb-floor-lamp) — A statement floor lamp wrapped in natural jute that radiates warm light and coastal texture. The two-bulb design gives it presence without bulk.

10. [Jennifer Taylor Home Calder 45" Console Table (Target)](https://www.target.com/p/jennifer-taylor-home-calder-45-solid-reclaimed-elm-plinth-console-table/-/A-1009908666) — Made from solid reclaimed elm, this console table brings authentic natural grain and a plinth-style base that suits the coastal-grandmother layered look.

11. [Mercana McArthur Light Brown Reclaimed Solid Wood Square Coffee Table, 48" (Bed Bath & Beyond)](https://www.bedbathandbeyond.com/Home-Garden/McArthur-48x48-Square-Brown-Reclaimed-Solid-Wood-Coffee-Table-48.0L-x-48.0W-x-14.0H/34237055/product.html) — A substantial square coffee table in warm reclaimed wood. The 48" footprint makes it a generous anchor for a larger sectional or sofa grouping.

12. [Crate & Barrel Unwind Modular 3-Piece Slipcovered Sectional Sofa](https://www.crateandbarrel.com/unwind-modular-3-piece-slipcovered-sectional-sofa/s659537) — The centerpiece of the room. This slipcovered sectional has the relaxed, lived-in quality that defines coastal grandmother style — casual but considered, and easy to keep clean.

[Browse coastal living room layouts on Etsy →](https://www.etsy.com/shop/athomeplans)

*Tags: Coastal Grandmother Style, Coastal Living Room, Coastal Decor, Coastal Grandmother Aesthetic, Beach House Interior, Natural Materials, Rattan Furniture, Slipcovered Sofa*
